name: artclaw_knowledge
description: Search ArtClaw local knowledge base for UE/Maya/Max API docs, code examples, naming conventions, and best practices. Use when AI needs to: (1) look up correct API usage before writing code, (2) find code examples for specific operations, (3) check naming conventions or project standards. Replaces old MCP tool: knowledge_search.
author: ArtClaw
